title: zskills Configuration
description: Configuration for zskills agent skill system. Controls execution modes, testing, CI, and UI verification.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file (for VS Code validation).

project_name.description: Human-readable project name. Used in PR titles and reports.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for timestamps in reports and markers. Example: America/New_York

execution.description: Controls how agent work reaches main.

landing.description: Default landing mode. cherry-pick: work in worktree, cherry-pick to main. pr: work in named worktree, push branch, create PR. direct: work on main, no landing step.

main_protected.description: When true, agents cannot commit, cherry-pick, or push to main. Forces PR or feature branch workflow.

branch_prefix.description: Prefix for branch names in PR mode. Examples: 'feat/', 'agent/', '' (empty = no prefix).

unit_cmd.description: Command to run unit tests. Example: npm run test

full_cmd.description: Command to run all tests (unit + integration + E2E). Example: npm run test:all

output_file.description: File where test output is captured.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns for test files. Example: ['tests/**/*.test.js']

dev_server.description: Development server configuration for manual testing.

cmd.description: Command to start the dev server. Example: npm start

port_script.description: Script that outputs the dev server port. Example: scripts/port.sh

main_repo_path.description: Absolute path to the main repo. Used by worktree agents to find the dev server.

file_patterns.description: Regex pattern matching UI files. When these files change, manual verification is required. Example: src/(components|ui)/.*\.tsx?$

auth_bypass.description: JavaScript to execute for auth bypass during manual testing. Example: localStorage.setItem('token', 'test')

ci.description: CI integration for PR mode. Controls whether the agent polls CI checks and attempts to fix failures.

auto_fix.description: When true, poll CI checks after PR creation and attempt to fix failures. When false, create PR and report URL without waiting. Set to false for slow CI (30+ min) or repos without CI.

max_fix_attempts.description: Maximum fix-and-push cycles when CI fails. 0 = poll and report only (no fix attempts). Each attempt comments on the PR with failure context.

min_model.description: Minimum model for subagent dispatch, enforced by the block-agents.sh hook. Accepts either a literal model string (e.g., 'claude-opus-4-6', 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'claude-haiku-4-5') or the sentinel 'auto' / 'inherit' which resolves at dispatch time to the current session's model (from the transcript). Recommended: 'auto' — your session's model becomes the floor automatically, so subagents can never silently downgrade. Ordinal comparison: haiku=1 < sonnet=2 < opus=3; unknown model families pass (future-proofing for new Claude releases).
